args: set -eu; if [ -n "${PATH:-}" ]; then PATH="$PATH:/bin:/usr/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin"; else PATH="/bin:/usr/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin"; fi; export PATH; candidate="${CODEX_HOME:-${HOME:-}/.codex}/plugins/cache/ai-plugins/agentic-systems-engineering/0.2.0/bin/promptfoo-mcp"; if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then exec "$candidate"; fi; echo "promptfoo.mcp_launcher_missing" >&2; exit 127
promptfoo.description: Promptfoo MCP server for validating configs, running focused evals, inspecting results, and developing eval cases from Codex.
